title: Diagnose a GenServer mailbox backup
description: Trace timeouts and growing memory to a process whose serial loop is blocked on slow work.
body: Steps: 1. Observe the symptom: GenServer.call timeouts, latency under load, or growing memory. 2. Inspect the process with Process.info(pid, :message_queue_len) (or :observer) to confirm a long mailbox. 3. Find the handle_call/handle_cast doing slow I/O or CPU work that serializes messages. 4. Offload that work to a Task or split the responsibility across processes / a pool. 5. Re-measure the queue length under load. Rollback point: before changing the process topology. Validation: message_queue_len stays bounded under load and callers no longer time out, confirmed by a load test.
